title: EVA Sound Bytes
wikitext: []: EVA Sound Bytes?             Quote Post by Xepheria » Mon Nov 11, 2013 9:59 am I'm looking for the humming sound made inside the EVA Cockpit. For those who don't know try watching the scene from Evangelion 2:22 where Shinji is sitting inside EVA Unit-01 waiting to start the mission to destroy the falling Angel from space. I want this sound preferably looped hopefully as it would make an awesome background noise for my computer! Any help would be much appreciated! Thanks!

chunks.content:
Article: EVA Sound Bytes
[]: EVA Sound Bytes?             Quote Post by Xepheria » Mon Nov 11, 2013 9:59 am I'm looking for the humming sound made inside the EVA Cockpit. For those who don't know try watching the scene from Evangelion 2:22 where Shinji is sitting inside EVA Unit-01 waiting to start the mission to destroy the falling Angel from space. I want this sound preferably looped hopefully as it would make an awesome background noise for my computer! Any help would be much appreciated! Thanks!
